## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Output stays inside assigned scope
- [ ] Required schema is followed
- [ ] Source links are included where required
- [ ] Duplicate or overlapping entries are flagged
- [ ] Maintainer can review the output without private context

## Rejection Criteria

- Medical advice
- Treatment recommendation wording
- Patient-specific output
- Missing or fake citations
- Unrelated edits
- Output outside assigned scope
